sentences.arabic: تَتَصَاعَدُ الدَّعَوَاتُ الدُّوَلِيَّةُ لِتَفْعِيلِ لُغَةِ الْحِوَارِ وَالدِّبْلُومَاسِيَّةِ لِحَلِّ النِّزَاعَاتِ الْإِقْلِيمِيَّةِ الْمُتَفَاقِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Međunarodni pozivi za aktiviranje jezika dijaloga i diplomatije radi rješavanja eskalirajućih regionalnih sukoba postaju sve glasniji.
sentences.translationEn: International calls to activate the language of dialogue and diplomacy to resolve escalating regional conflicts are intensifying.

sentences.arabic: فَقَدْ ثَبُتَ عَبْرَ التَّارِيخِ أَنَّ الْحُلُولَ الْعَسْكَرِيَّةَ لَا تُؤَدِّي إِلَّا إِلَى مَزِيدٍ مِنَ الدَّمَارِ وَتَشْرِيدِ الْمَدَنِيِّينَ.
sentences.translation: Kroz historiju se pokazalo da vojna rješenja vode samo do većeg razaranja i raseljavanja civila.
sentences.translationEn: It has been proven throughout history that military solutions only lead to more destruction and the displacement of civilians.

sentences.arabic: وَبِنَاءً عَلَى ذَلِكَ، تَقُودُ بَعْضُ الدُّوَلِ الْمُحَايِدَةِ وَسَاطَاتٍ مَكُّوكِيَّةً لِتَقْرِيبِ وُجُهَاتِ النَّظَرِ بَيْنَ الْأَطْرَافِ الْمُتَنَازِعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Shodno tome, neke neutralne zemlje vode šatl diplomatiju kako bi približile stavove zaraćenih strana.
sentences.translationEn: Accordingly, some neutral countries are leading shuttle diplomacy to bring the viewpoints of the conflicting parties closer together.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا تُشَدِّدُ الْأُمَمُ الْمُتَّحِدَةُ عَلَى ضَرُورَةِ الِالْتِزَامِ بِالْقَانُونِ الدُّوَلِيِّ وَاحْتِرَامِ سِيَادَةِ الدُّوَلِ.
sentences.translation: Ujedinjene nacije također naglašavaju potrebu za poštovanjem međunarodnog prava i suvereniteta država.
sentences.translationEn: The United Nations also emphasizes the need for commitment to international law and respect for state sovereignty.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَحْقِيقَ السَّلَامِ الدَّائِمِ يَتَطَلَّبُ تَقْدِيمَ تَنَازُلَاتٍ مُتَبَادَلَةٍ وَإِبْدَاءَ حُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِي الْمُفَاوَضَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Postizanje trajnog mira zahtijeva uzajamne ustupke i pokazivanje dobre volje u pregovorima.
sentences.translationEn: Achieving lasting peace requires making mutual concessions and showing good faith in negotiations.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ ذَلِكَ، تَبْقَى التَّحَدِّيَاتُ الْجِيُوسِيَاسِيَّةُ عَقَبَةً كَبِيرَةً أَمَامَ التَّوَصُّلِ إِلَى اتِّفَاقِيَّاتٍ شَامِلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ipak, geopolitički izazovi ostaju velika prepreka postizanju sveobuhvatnih sporazuma.
sentences.translationEn: However, geopolitical challenges remain a major obstacle to reaching comprehensive agreements.

sentences.arabic: وَلَا يَزَالُ الْمُجْتَمَعُ الدُّوَلِيُّ يَعْقِدُ آمَالًا كَبِيرَةً عَلَى نَجَاحِ الْقِمَمِ الْمُرْتَقَبَةِ فِي نَزْعِ فَتِيلِ الْأَزَمَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Međunarodna zajednica i dalje polaže velike nade u uspjeh predstojećih samita u smirivanju kriza.
sentences.translationEn: The international community still holds high hopes for the success of upcoming summits in defusing crises.
